final_files.tests/test_final.py:
import json

from test_public import database, sql


def test_escaped_and_neighboring_role_codes_compose_without_text_matching():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO document VALUES (?, ?, ?)", [
        (1, "Quoted", 'qa"lead'), (2, "Neighbor", "qa-lead"), (3, "Short", "qa")
    ])
    rows = db.execute(
        sql("select_authorized_documents.sql"),
        {"roles_json": json.dumps(['qa"lead', "qa-lead"])},
    ).fetchall()
    assert rows == [(1, "Quoted"), (2, "Neighbor")]

    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO principal_grant VALUES (?, ?)",
        ("p3", json.dumps(["qa", 'qa"lead', "qa-lead"])),
    )
    db.execute(sql("delete_role_grant.sql"), {"principal_id": "p3", "role": "qa"})
    roles = json.loads(db.execute("SELECT roles_json FROM principal_grant").fetchone()[0])
    assert roles == ['qa"lead', "qa-lead"]
